creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Build fails on arm64:

/usr/local/bin/ld: i386:x86-64 architecture of input file `/wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/zeno/work/zeno-2024.10.1/ui/zeno
ui/../qwt/libs/linux/libqwt.a(qwt_magnifier.o)' is incompatible with aarch64 output

It appears that zeno-2024.10.1/ui/qwt/libs/linux/libqwt.a is a pre-built library the port appears to link.  This is usually not permitted, all components of the project must be built from source if possible.  It is also likely that it won't work as the library was built for Linux while we are building for FreeBSD.

Please check and resubmit.
